name: Sweet/Sour Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 1 Teaspoon Browning Sauce (Like Gravy Master), For Color
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop cabbage.
2. Add water to a Dutch oven, bring to a boil, then add cabbage and cook until the cabbage is tender (about 10-15 minutes). Drain and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, cook bacon until crisp. Remove bacon; set aside.
4. Sauté onion in drippings from the bacon until tender.
5. Add flour to the skillet and mix well.
6. Gradually add water, vinegar, brown sugar, salt, pepper, and browning sauce to the skillet. Cook and stir until the mixture thickens.
7. Stir in the cabbage and serve warm.
